zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Clopton於大約1338年出生在英國素福爾可霍斯亞德時，她的父親Walter De Clopton42歲，母親Alice Fitzhugh40歲。她於1360年之前與Sir Walter Walcott結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1388年在英國貝德福爾布勒左享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Clopton于大约1338年出生在英国素福爾可霍斯亞德时，她的父亲Walter De Clopton42岁，母亲Alice Fitzhugh40岁。她于1360年之前与Sir Walter Walcott结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1388年在英国貝德福爾布勒左享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clopton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, for examplein Essex, Suffolk, and Warwickshire, named Clopton from Old Englishclopp(a) ‘rock, hill’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Clopton was born about 1338, in Hawstead, Suffolk, England, her father, Walter De Clopton, was 42 and her mother, Alice Fitzhugh, was 40. She married Sir Walter Walcott before 1360. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in 1388, in Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Clopton est née environ 1338, à Hawstead, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Walter De Clopton, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alice Fitzhugh, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Walter Walcott avant 1360. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1388, à Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Clopton um 1338 in Hawstead, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter De Clopton 42 und ihre Mutter Alice Fitzhugh 40. Sie hat vor 1360 Sir Walter Walcott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1388 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Clopton è nata il circa 1338 nel Hawstead, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Walter De Clopton, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Alice Fitzhugh, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Sir Walter Walcott prima del 1360. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1388, nel Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Cloptonが約1338年にイギリススフォルクハウステアドで生まれた時，父Walter De Cloptonは42歳，母Alice Fitzhughは40歳であった。1360年以前にSir Walter Walcottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1388年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアブレトソで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Clopton(이)가 대략 1338년 영국 수폴크 호스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter De Clopton(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Fitzhugh(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1360년 이전 Sir Walter Walcott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1388년 영국 베드퍼드실르 블레츠에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Clopton nasceu aproximadamente 1338, em Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter De Clopton, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Alice Fitzhugh, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Walter Walcott antes 1360. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1388, em Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Clopton родилась около 1338 г. в местности хавстид, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter De Clopton было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Fitzhugh, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter Walcott перед 1360 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1388 г. в местности блецо, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Clopton nació aproximadamente 1338, en Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter De Clopton, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Alice Fitzhugh, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Sir Walter Walcott antes de 1360. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1388, en Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
